race.comment: MANAAJEM (3) returns from a 48-day let-up after resuming with a plugging on pace third over 1250m at Canterbury in BM64 class. Since fitted with a 1050m trial at Randwick. Well drawn and can find winning form in this class. WINNER OF KOWLOON (4) finally gets a decent surface for this third-up. Taken back from the wide barrier and never got into the contest with a battling eighth over 1300m at Kembla Grange in the soft (7) conditions. Can sit off the fast tempo and savage the line. Each-way. ISSY'S STAR (7) covered a stack of ground in the run from the outside barrier with a plodding sixth over 1200m at this track. Kept up to the mark with an 850m tick over trial and assess on the good first-up second. BEVERLY HILLS (6) failed to close off first-up with a disappointing fifth over 1200m at Canterbury. Norton bit goes on and expected to take a hand in the finish.
